task_description: compute the total size of all Markdown files
code:
echo "Checking if there are any Markdown files..."
find . -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.markdown" \)

trace.stdout: Checking if there are any Markdown files...

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting to find Markdown files..."
find . -type f -name "*.md" -o -name "*.markdown"
```

execution trace:
stdout:
Starting to find Markdown files...


stderr:


return code: 0

```bash
echo "Finding Markdown files and calculating their sizes..."
find . -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.markdown" \) -exec du -c {} + | grep total$
```

execution trace:
stdout:
Finding Markdown files and calculating their sizes...


stderr:


return code: 1
